title: MDCAT Week 1 Assignment
tasks: Review all wrong answers by topic.
teacherNote: Check whether the student is weak in concept recall or time pressure.

title: FAST Quant Speed Assignment
tasks: Attempt one analytical arrangement set daily.
teacherNote: Observe speed, careless errors and algebraic translation.

title: NAT Mixed Aptitude Assignment
teacherNote: Use this to identify the student’s strongest and weakest aptitude section.

title: LAT Essay and Reasoning Assignment
teacherNote: Check clarity of thesis, relevance of examples and reasoning accuracy.

title: IELTS Writing Improvement Assignment
teacherNote: Assess task response, coherence, grammar control and vocabulary range.
